mapper.insert:
SELECT 'MESSAGE-' || NVL(MAX(TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(message_id, 9))) + 1, 1) FROM Messages WHERE message_id LIKE 'MESSAGE-%'
INSERT INTO Messages (message_id, room_id, emp_code, message, created_at) VALUES (#{messageId}, #{roomId}, #{empCode}, #{message}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.select: SELECT m.message_id AS messageId, m.room_id AS roomId, m.emp_code AS empCode, e.emp_name AS empName, m.message, m.created_at AS createdAt FROM messages m JOIN emp e ON m.emp_code = e.emp_code WHERE m.room_id = #{roomId} ORDER BY m.created_at ASC
SELECT room_id AS roomId, room_name AS roomName FROM Rooms
